tasks.label: Build Release Win32
tasks.command: $msbuild = & 'C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/Installer/vswhere.exe' -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1; & $msbuild DelHelX.sln /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x86 /p:OutDir=${workspaceFolder}\Release\ /m

tasks.label: Build Debug Win32
tasks.command: $msbuild = & 'C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/Installer/vswhere.exe' -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1; & $msbuild DelHelX.sln /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x86 /p:OutDir=${workspaceFolder}\Debug\ /m
